title: feat(tui): add command palette (Ctrl+K) and SearchableListOverlay base class
summary: Adds a fuzzy-searchable Command Palette (Ctrl+K) to the Mastra Code TUI and extracts a reusable SearchableListOverlay base class from ModelSelectorComponent and ThreadSelectorComponent, eliminating ~70 lines of duplicated overlay boilerplate. The base class provides focusable implementation, search input with fuzzy filtering, scrollable list with wrap-around navigation, and empty state messaging. Three new files (searchable-list-overlay.ts, command-palette component, command-palette command handler) plus refactoring of model-selector and thread-selector to extend the base class.
maintainerNotes: PR has merge conflicts and CI failures (Core tests, Memory tests, Lint). The CI failures in Core and Memory tests may be pre-existing/unrelated to TUI changes, but Lint failure likely needs attention. No automated tests are included — the test plan is manual only. The refactoring is well-structured: extracting a clean base class pattern. Author is a maintainer but hasn't updated the PR in 12 days. Needs conflict resolution and CI fixes before review.
